_schema.deferred_track: string - 当前降级但保留的链路
_schema.current_atomic_task: string - 当前唯一白天主线原子任务
_schema.frontier_tasks: object[] - 当前前沿任务窗口，最多 3 个
_schema.pending_task_queue: object[] - 近期可认领队列，按推荐顺序排列
_schema.completed_atomic_tasks: string[] - 路线图相关已完成原子任务 ID 列表
_schema.next_task_selection_basis: object - 下一任务选择依据
_schema.night_run_mode: object - 夜跑 / 无人值守安全执行边界
_schema.archive_state: object - v0.2.0 前历史文档归档状态与读取条件
_schema.notes: string[] - 下一轮必须保留的关键说明

current_stage_name: 长期产品路线图执行启动
current_stage_goal: v0.3.0 已发布（59 commits since v0.2.0）：DeepSeek AI 草稿接入、搜索能力套件、workflow 表单持久化、服务器备份/恢复/诊断、release 部署准备。已知 DeepSeek 草稿存在 task 类型校验边界问题，不影响规则降级路径。post-0.3 / Hermes 备案项 `AI-DRAFT-DEEPSEEK-SCHEMA-GUARD` 与 `HERMES-EXPERIMENT-BOOTSTRAP` 已登记到 planning / handoff，但当前不进入执行窗口。下一步需用户确认 DeepSeek 实际返回的 output.task 后再执行修复。
primary_track: v0.3.0 released with 64 commits; DEP-01~06 all completed (user-dir deploy, static dist serve, version/health endpoints, systemd autostart with reboot verify); DATA-01 backup/restore verify now active; DeepSeek draft task-type mismatch bug identified but not fixed
deferred_track: DeepSeek draft task-type fix、real-provider smoke、AI-DRAFT-DEEPSEEK-SCHEMA-GUARD、HERMES-EXPERIMENT-BOOTSTRAP、REALAI-05/06、repo connector、RAG/embedding、权限系统和硬件自动接入均后置到依赖满足或用户拍板后。

roadmap_tracks.goal: 服务器稳定运行、可更新、可诊断。
数据不丢、可备份、可恢复。
现场记录和结案更快、更顺。
历史问题能找回、能复用。
先把 AI 草稿流和 prompt schema 做稳，不依赖真实 API。
真实 AI 帮助优化措辞、总结排查、建议预防。
AI 能基于用户显式提供的代码上下文分析问题。

assessment_state.conclusion: No prerequisite broad refactor is needed before DEP-01 or the completed B group. SEARCH-07/08/09, UI-01, CORE-02, CORE-03, CORE-06, AIREADY-05, UI-GATE-01, TECH-07, UI-MOD-01, UI-RELAYOUT-01, UI-POLISH-02 and UI-POLISH-03 are complete. App.tsx, HTTP repository, server database and verify scripts have real friction; UI-POLISH-03 stayed a quick issue landing layout pass, not a full rewrite or business-flow redesign.
assessment_state.recommended_next_task: UI-GATE-06-MANUAL-QUICK-ISSUE-LAYOUT-REVIEW is current/day-only/manual. AI must stop and wait for the user to inspect desktop and mobile layout before any next UI polish.

server.system_node: v10.19.0, must not be used or upgraded for ProbeFlash

frontier_tasks.goal: 在服务器 /home/hurricane/probeflash 下使用 GitHub Release tarball 完成 no-sudo 用户目录部署验证。
requires_user_confirmation: release asset download or upload method
permission to start a temporary user-owned process

frontier_tasks.goal: 快速建卡 landing 调整后由用户人工检查桌面端和移动端观感，再决定是否进入下一轮 UI polish。
requires_user_confirmation: desktop quick issue landing visual review
mobile quick issue landing smoke check
explicit approval before any next UI polish

b_group_plan.rule: B group is planned together but executed serially: one atomic task, one verification set, one commit per round.
b_group_plan.decision: After B group and UI-GATE-01, TECH-07 completed as an enabling split and the user accepted the split result. UI-MOD-01 behavior-preserving component extraction, UI-RELAYOUT-01 first-pass workbench relayout, UI-POLISH-02 copy trim and UI-POLISH-03 quick issue landing layout are complete; AI must stop at UI-GATE-06 manual quick issue layout review before any next UI polish. Do not prioritize TECH-08/09/10 broad refactors unless a concrete storage/server task requires them.

confirmed_first_screen_regions: 顶部栏：ProbeFlash + 阶段边界 + 归档/结案入口，primary，保留独立部署未验证。
Project context bar：当前项目 + 存储/服务器状态，primary，保留 HTTP + SQLite / error 状态。
Issue rail + quick create：primary，显示当前项目归属。
Issue main flow：当前问题主线、追记、时间线，primary，显示真实状态。
Knowledge Assist：Search / similar / recurrence / related history，secondary，桌面侧栏或移动端下沉，标注规则提示 / 辅助判断。
Closeout panel：secondary，按需聚焦，规则草稿非真实 AI。
Archive review / footer boundary：auxiliary，不隐藏 SQLite / .debug_workspace / Electron/fs/IPC 边界。
real_boundaries_to_preserve: 服务器未独立部署：可产品化表达，但必须保留独立部署未验证。
localStorage 兼容路径仍存在：尤其 closeout 草稿历史是浏览器本地保存。
真实 AI 未接入：AI-ready / rule-based draft 不能包装成模型能力。
AI-ready 是规则草稿：必须强调规则、草稿、人工审阅，不自动写库。
Code context 未接入：若改 shell，可补低优先级边界，说明需要用户显式生成 bundle。

tech_07_split_targets.app_tsx_region: Header + toolbar + StorageStatusBanner render around apps/desktop/src/App.tsx:3059-3106; reuse existing ProjectSelector and ArchiveEntryButton.
SearchPanel render around 2197-2205 plus recurrence / related / similar render around 2237-2267.
Issue workspace main flow around 2218-2305, including MainlineResultPanel, record append/list and CloseoutForm render placement without changing CloseoutForm internals.

tech_07_do_not_extract_now: CloseoutForm internals, because closeout is high-risk and first UI pass does not reorder it.
repository / storage hooks, because storage semantics and localStorage compatibility must not change.
ArchiveListDrawer internals, because archive is auxiliary and not first-pass scope.
CSS token system, because visual implementation waits until component boundaries are stable.
tech_07_forbidden_scope: No schema / repository / HTTP API / server changes.
No real AI, RAG, Electron, preload, fs or IPC.
Do not remove localStorage compatibility verify path.
Do not hide server, localStorage, AI-ready or Code context boundaries.
ui_gate_01_confirmation.first_ui_change_after_tech_07: UI-GATE-02 first implementation should only prioritize shell / workspace status / Knowledge Assist hierarchy; do not do closeout reorder or archive drawer redesign in the first pass.

depends_on: HTTP + SQLite schema and local fixture path

pending_task_queue.execution_contract: Completed as behavior-preserving pure display shell split; no visual redesign or business changes.

pending_task_queue.execution_contract: Completed QuickIssue landing, severity select, three-region workbench hierarchy, Knowledge Assist supporting rail and old numbered copy cleanup; no schema/repository/HTTP API/server/AI changes.

pending_task_queue.execution_contract: Compressed explanatory UI copy while preserving server/storage status, Repair Task, no-real-AI and no-file-write boundaries; no schema/repository/HTTP API/server/business flow changes.

pending_task_queue.confirmation: User requested quick issue create area enlargement and moving auxiliary verification below the no-selected-issue hint.

execution_cadence.one_week_goal: 部署可用、数据安全、可观测。
execution_cadence.two_to_four_week_goal: B 组本地 UI / core / AI-ready 小闭环，然后 code context bundle。
execution_cadence.one_to_two_month_goal: 真实 AI、知识库、架构拆分。

decision_needed: 长期是否做权限系统、多队伍协作、RAG/embedding、硬件日志自动接入

required_inputs: 当前任务直接相关文件
next_task_selection_basis.optional_overview_input: docs/planning/status.md：只作人类快速概览，不得替代 current/backlog/product-roadmap/handoff.json。
conditional_inputs: docs/planning/product-roadmap.md：完整路线图、任务字段、节奏、任务池
docs/planning/backlog.md：候选池、节奏队列、任务池
docs/planning/decisions.md：阶段切换、长期规则变化或技术拍板
README.md：对外展示 / 快速开始 / release 口径变化
docs/product/产品介绍.md：产品定义 / 领域语言变化
docs/archive/v0.2-closeout/：仅 v0.2.0 前历史背景、专项追溯或归档审计

Next task is DATA-01-SQLITE-BACKUP-SERVER-PATH-VERIFY to confirm backup/restore and WAL file handling. UI-GATE-06 remains manual review only. DeepSeek real provider smoke still requires user-local env setup.

next_task_selection_basis.recommended_next_ui_task: UI-GATE-06-MANUAL-QUICK-ISSUE-LAYOUT-REVIEW remains manual review only; do not auto-start new UI polish.
next_task_selection_basis.b_group_order: UI-01, CORE-02, CORE-03, CORE-06, AIREADY-05, UI-GATE-01, TECH-07, UI-GATE-02, UI-MOD-01, UI-GATE-03, UI-RELAYOUT-01, UI-POLISH-02 and UI-POLISH-03 are complete; B group, manual visual gate, enabling split review, first-pass relayout, copy trim and quick issue landing layout are closed.

next_task_selection_basis.alternative_night_safe: Do not choose AIREADY/CODECTX/CORE alternatives, REALAI-05/06, or next UI implementation unless the user explicitly redirects; real provider smoke requires user-owned API key setup.
next_task_selection_basis.refactor_gate: CODEBASE-REFINE-NECESSITY-AUDIT found no required broad refactor gate before DEP-01 or the B group. SEARCH-07, UI-01, UI-GATE-01, TECH-07, UI-MOD-01, UI-RELAYOUT-01, UI-POLISH-02 and UI-POLISH-03 are complete. TECH-07 stayed an enabling split; UI-POLISH-03 stayed a quick issue landing layout pass, not a full App.tsx rewrite or business redesign.
next_task_selection_basis.selection_rule: 当前完成 CORE-CLOSEOUT-CONTINUATION-UX 与 investigation append key namespace fix 后必须停止；不得读取 /home/rainman/.config/probeflash/deepseek.env 或任何真实密钥文件。下一步若要真实 smoke，用户自行 source env 并启动 server；若要继续开发 REALAI-05/06、DEP-01 或 UI-GATE-06，必须重新经过 planning 选择。

night_run_mode.policy: Night run / unattended mode may only execute repo-local, automatically verifiable and rollback-friendly atomic tasks. External systems, real servers, privileged operations, destructive data operations and product decisions must stop with handoff.
forbidden_actions: GitHub release 删除 / tag 删除
需要用户拍板的产品方向
真实 AI provider / API key 接入
stop_conditions: git status --short 不干净且无法归类
typecheck / build / verify 失败且不能在当前任务边界内修复
需要 SSH / sudo / systemd / 外部账号 / API key
需要用户确认路径、权限、端口、账号或密钥
planning 与代码冲突且无法判断谁 stale
连续两次修复验证仍失败
night_run_mode.server_task_policy: DEP-01、DEP-06、DEP-08 与任何真实服务器 / systemd / sudo 任务都不能夜跑。

archive_state.default_read_policy: Do not read archive by default. Read only for v0.2.0 前历史背景、专项实现追溯、API / SQLite / 不可达策略背景、release closeout 追溯或归档审计。

systemd 自启依赖 DEP-01 和用户 sudo/systemd 授权，不得夜跑。
DeepSeek code-side minimal integration completed, but real provider smoke still requires user-run env setup; AI must not read or handle the key.

docs/planning/status.md 只是快速状态索引，不得替代 current/backlog/product-roadmap/handoff.json。
UI-GATE-01 已人工确认，TECH-07、UI-MOD-01、UI-RELAYOUT-01、UI-POLISH-02 与 UI-POLISH-03 均已按 contract 完成；不得直接全量重写 App.tsx、引入组件库或改变业务数据流。
